other_fees.name: Annual Management Services Fee (Class I shares)

extracted_from: Waystone Management Company (IE) Limited... receives a management company fee... up to 0.02%... All Class I shares 1.50%... The Depositary receives an annual fee of up to 0.03%... Class I EUR accumulation 1.61%.
extraction_notes: The 'management_fee_pct' for the Investment Manager is not separately disclosed as it is paid out of the 'Annual Management Services Fee'. Similarly, the Administrator's fee is not separately disclosed, preventing a combined 'admin_depositary_fees_pct'. The 'Annual Management Services Fee' includes both the Investment Manager's and Administrator's fees. Values for Class I shares (or Class I EUR accumulation for TER) are provided as a representative class, assuming it has the most capital or is a common retail equivalent. The 'extracted_from' quote is a concatenation of literal phrases from different sections to cover multiple fee components within the character limit.
